creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #10)

(In reply to Sergio Carlavilla Delgado from comment #6)

<https://lists.freebsd.org/search> was recently promoted without the promoter(s) describing it as experimental. 

Should we cease to describe it as experimental under <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/eresources/#eresources-mail>?
